name: Anchamoufrite
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If you have no cards in your Extra Deck except "Anchamoufrite": You can destroy this card, then draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Anchamoufrite" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your face-up Extra Deck) by having no cards in your Extra Deck except "Anchamoufrite". You can only Special Summon "Anchamoufrite" once per turn this way. If this face-up card in the Monster Zone leaves the field, banish it.
pend_eff: If you have no cards in your Extra Deck except "Anchamoufrite": You can destroy this card, then draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Anchamoufrite" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your face-up Extra Deck) by having no cards in your Extra Deck except "Anchamoufrite". You can only Special Summon "Anchamoufrite" once per turn this way. If this face-up card in the Monster Zone leaves the field, banish it.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your face-up Extra Deck) by having no cards in your Extra Deck except "Anchamoufrite". You can only Special Summon "Anchamoufrite" once per turn this way. If this face-up card in the Monster Zone leaves the field, banish it.

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Condition, Unclassified
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
Pendulum Monsters that cannot be Pendulum Summoned
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
misc: Requires having no cards in Extra Deck
